prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial opens on a nearly black frame, with no clearly visible content.

It then cuts to a warm, softly lit, crowded restaurant or café scene viewed from above. Many people are seated at small tables, eating and socializing. The image has a hazy, glowing look, with busy movement throughout the space.

The next shots focus on food and desserts. A server or diner is shown carrying plates, including a plate with a bright yellow-centered dessert and red fruit-like toppings. This is followed by close-up dessert imagery: a layered slice with whipped cream and toppings, then a square chocolate dessert on a white plate topped with whipped cream, nuts, and syrup being poured from above. The food is presented in close, glossy, appetizing shots.

A woman is then shown seated at a table, smiling or speaking, holding a fork with a bite of dessert near her mouth. A plate with dessert is visible in front of her. The background remains blurred and restaurant-like.

The commercial shifts to a close-up of a small rectangular package held between fingers. The package is a blue-and-white Trident gum pack. The visible text includes “Trident” and “Original Flavor,” and in the clearest later frame, “SUGARLESS GUM” is also readable. The product is shown in soft focus with hands holding it near the camera.

A close-up of a man follows. He appears to be in the same social dining setting, facing someone off-camera or partly visible in the foreground. His mouth is open, suggesting he may be speaking or reacting, but no audio content can be inferred from the frames.

An overhead table shot then shows several people around a table with plates and cups. One person appears to be extending or handing something across the table, but the exact object is not clearly visible in that frame.

The final part returns to repeated close-ups of the Trident package. The pack fills much of the frame, held between fingers, with the branding emphasized. The last frame clearly shows the package text: “Trident,” “SUGARLESS GUM,” and “Original Flavor.” The background remains softly blurred, maintaining the warm restaurant atmosphere while the product becomes the central visual focus.
